summary: CRITICAL: Missing EnvironmentMatrixGenerator.Tests.ps1 file referenced in workflow line 39. Test harness doesn't implement required test fixtures/assertions per spec. Duplicate 'Install PowerShell' steps (lines 30, 56, 85, 103) should consolidate. Generated matrix output ignored—job 'use-generated-matrix' hardcodes matrix instead of using ${{ needs.generate-matrix-example.outputs.matrix }}. No actionlint validation. Test harness checks generic 'Job succeeded' but doesn't validate actual matrix content against expected values. Module structure OK but workflow+test harness incomplete.
